title: Another Vanilla Plus Pack
description:
Wait... I think I've seen this before...

This modpack includes over 100 mods to improve Minecraft while keeping the original vanilla feel!
body: The purpose of this modpack is to improve Minecraft while keeping the vanilla feel. The modpack includes updated structures and dimensions to keep the game fresh and exciting. This modpack also includes mods to improve the GUI, framerate, and gameplay to make your Minecraft experience smooth and enjoyable.
